mapper.sql: id, party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party_member ( party_id, user_id, role, status, joined_at, activated_at, service_start_at, service_end_at, leave_reserved_at, left_at, replaced_target_member_id ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{joinedAt}, #{activatedAt}, #{serviceStartAt}, #{serviceEndAt}, #{leaveReservedAt}, #{leftAt}, #{replacedTargetMemberId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND role = 'HOST' LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND role = 'MEMBER' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status = 'LEAVE_RESERVED' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status = 'SWITCH_WAITING' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING') ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING', 'LEAVE_RESERVED', 'SWITCH_WAITING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM party_member WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND role = 'MEMBER' AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE party_member SET status = #{status}, left_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{memberId}
UPDATE party_member SET status = #{status}, activated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{memberId}
